hero.headline: Seamless Digital Transitions for Your Brand
hero.subtext: We build high-performance digital experiences that capture your social brand's energy — not just another website.

speed.label: Average Load Time
speed.desc: Fast websites mean higher conversions. We're obsessive about performance.

motion.label: Zero-Jank Motion
motion.desc: Precision-engineered animations that make interfaces feel alive and premium.

social.label: Social-to-Site
social.desc: Purpose-built for Instagram & TikTok in-app browsers. From swipe up straight to checkout.

deck.label: Our Services
deck.title: The Right Solution for Your Brand
deck.subtitle: Every brand has different needs. Choose the service that fits your digital growth stage.

cards.title: Atmospheric Microsite
cards.description: High-fidelity landing pages purpose-built for product drops, campaigns, or brand stories. One page, one focus, maximum impact.

cards.title: Direct-Conversion Engine
cards.tagline: Built to convert, designed to retain.
cards.description: Custom e-commerce storefronts optimized for the Indonesian payment landscape (Xendit/Midtrans) with extreme mobile speed.

cards.title: Digital Audit & Strategy
cards.tagline: Not sure where to start? Start here.
cards.description: A consultative deep-dive into your brand's digital friction points, delivered via a high-fidelity video report with an actionable roadmap.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: Project Performance Circuit
process.subtitle: Scroll to see how your idea accelerates from the starting grid to public launch.

steps.title: Discovery & Briefing
steps.description: Deep discussion sessions to map business goals, sitemap structures, and visual moodboards.

steps.title: Interactive Prototyping
steps.description: We design directly in code on a private staging server. Watch high-fidelity layouts come alive early.

steps.title: Visual Lock & Review
steps.description: Evaluate layouts and responsiveness on staging. We refine and lock visuals before coding backend systems.

steps.title: Functional Build
steps.description: Wiring functional engines, connecting dynamic CMS, databases, and executing performance optimization.

steps.title: Pre-Flight Inspection
steps.description: End-to-end functionality checks, bilingual copywriting adjustments, and search engine optimization.

steps.title: Launch & Tuning
steps.description: Connecting custom domains, deploying secure SSL certificates, and going live to the public.

steps.title: Lifetime Support
steps.description: Post-launch speed monitoring, periodic database backups, security patches, and minor updates.

quote.label: Start a Project
quote.title: Tell Us Your Vision
quote.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 business hours with a custom proposal.

form.name: Full Name
form.message: Tell us a bit about your project
form.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.

pricing.label: Pricing & Packages
pricing.title: Investment for Digital Growth
pricing.subtitle: From a simple profile page to a complex e-commerce platform, choose the package that fits your vision.

footer.tagline: Seamless Digital Transitions for social-first brands in Indonesia.
